units.source_text: 1 Portfolio diversification is the market risk dispersion effect of holding a portfolio containing different risk types. It represents the reduction in unsystematic
units.translation_target_text: 1 投资组合多元化是指持有包含不同风险类型的投资组合所产生的市场风险分散效应。它代表着非系统性的减少
units.translation_zh: 1 投资组合多元化是指持有包含不同风险类型的投资组合所产生的市场风险分散效应。它代表着非系统性的减少

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 1 投资组合多元化是指持有包含不同风险类型的投资组合所产生的市场风险分散效应。它代表着非系统性的减少

units.source_text: market risk that occurs when combining a number of different risk types – such as interest rate and credit spreads – together in one portfolio. It is measured as
units.translation_target_text: 将多种不同风险类型（例如利率和信用利差）组合到一个投资组合中时出现的市场风险。它被测量为
units.translation_zh: 将多种不同风险类型（例如利率和信用利差）组合到一个投资组合中时出现的市场风险。它被测量为

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 将多种不同风险类型（例如利率和信用利差）组合到一个投资组合中时出现的市场风险。它被测量为

units.source_text: the difference between the sum of the VaR by individual risk type and the combined total VaR. A negative number represents the benefit of portfolio
